series_metadata.series_description: Records contains U.S. Department of Labor (DOL) Employment & Training Administration (ETA) forms and supporting documents that are completed and submitted by employers who wish to hire non-immigrant foreign labor for jobs in Ohio as well as regional documents created by the State for administration of the program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office certification is granted or denied and and 9 months in Records Center ; Electronic: superseded, obsolete, or replaced
